report.summary: Community cycle v7 (late night): Drafted 3 tweets (#223-225) covering new Solana LST Comparison + RWA vs DeFi Yield guides, Lido DAO surging on staking reclassification, and 5 catalysts for the week ahead (MSBT listing, commodities framework, 50-day fear streak watch). Created Discord/TG Saturday night wrap and Newsletter v38 'The Staking Reclassification' edition. Designed SVG social card: Staking Reclassification (1200x630 with 4 metric cards, Solana LST bars, RWA yield stats, fear gauge). 577 pages published. 225 total tweets drafted.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #223: New Guides Drop — Solana LST Comparison (Marinade vs Jito vs Sanctum, $8B+ TVL) and RWA vs DeFi Yield ($12B tokenized treasuries, 5 portfolio strategies). Links to both new learn pages. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 12PM ET.

Tweet #224: Lido DAO Surges While ETH Bleeds Thread (4 parts) — SEC/CFTC staking reclassification removes regulatory overhang, LDO controls 28% of staked ETH, Solana LST ecosystem growing ($8B+), institutional accumulation thesis. Links to whale-tracker + solana-lst-comparison. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 5PM ET.

Tweet #225: Week Ahead 5 Catalysts — Morgan Stanley MSBT listing, digital commodities framework effective, $14B options settlement fallout, month-end rebalancing, 50-day fear streak watch (currently at 48). Links to fear-greed-timeline + risk-analyzer. Scheduled: Tue Mar 31, 9AM ET.

Discord/TG: Saturday Night Wrap — BTC $66,008, ETH $1,993, SOL $83.08, F&G 12 (day 48). Top movers: Siren +99%, Lido DAO surging. New guides: Solana LST Comparison + RWA vs DeFi Yield. Week ahead catalysts. 577 pages live.

Newsletter v38: The Staking Reclassification — Subject: 'The SEC Just Changed Staking Forever'. Market pulse (48-day fear streak, 2 days from record), new guides (Solana LST + RWA yield), worth reading (Crypto ETFs updated, Halving 2028 day 703), degen corner on LDO surging + Siren +99%.

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: Staking Reclassification (1200x630) — Dark glass-morphism design with animated REGULATORY SHIFT badge (pulsing green dot). Main headline: 'Staking Reclassified' in green gradient with SEC/CFTC subtitle. 4 metric cards: 16 Tokens Reclassified (ETH, SOL, ADA, DOT, AVAX + 11 more), LDO Surging (28% staked ETH, regulatory risk removed), BTC $66,008 (-48% ATH, 270K whale accumulation), F&G 12 (day 48, 2 days from record). Fear gauge bar at 12/100. Solana LST comparison bars (JitoSOL 14.3M, mSOL 12.1M, INF 8.5% APY). RWA section ($12B tokenized treasuries, BlackRock BUIDL + Ondo stats). Context strip: MSBT 0.14%, SEC ruling, whale accumulation, options expiry, 577 pages. Saved to reports/community-drafts/2026-03-28-social-card-staking-reclassification.svg
